channel.title: Shreyas Korad — Writing
channel.description: Articles and insights on learning design, gamification, and L&D strategy.

item.title: Mechanics fail when motivation design is weak
item.description: Mechanics fail when motivation design is weak: Teams are treating gamification design as tooling rollout, but the real constraint is whether work systems, manager behavior, and capability-building routines actually change.

item.title: Gamification fails at the moment of choice
item.description: Gamification fails at the moment of choice: Teams are treating gamification design as tooling rollout, but the real constraint is whether work systems, manager behavior, and capability-building routines actually change.
